title: Aaliya's Big Feelings Day
synopsis: When Aaliya's special teddy bear goes missing, she experiences big sad feelings that feel overwhelming. With help from her loving family, she learns that it's okay to feel sad and that asking for help can make everything better.

pages.text: Aaliya loved her soft brown teddy bear named Koko more than anything in the whole world. Every morning, she would give Koko a big squeeze and whisper 'Good morning!' in his fuzzy ear. But today was different. Today, Koko was nowhere to be found.

illustration.description: A young South Asian girl with long dark hair in two braids sits on her colorful bed, looking around with worried eyes. Her room is bright and cheerful with rainbow walls, toy blocks scattered on the floor, and stuffed animals on shelves. The composition shows an empty space where her teddy bear usually sits, emphasizing the absence.
illustration.alt: Aaliya searching for her missing teddy bear in her bedroom

pages.text: Aaliya's eyes filled with big, sad tears. Her bottom lip wobbled like jelly. 'Mama!' she called, her voice shaky and scared. 'I can't find Koko anywhere!' The sad feeling in her tummy felt so big and heavy, like a gray rain cloud.

illustration.description: Close-up of Aaliya's expressive face showing big tears rolling down her cheeks, with her mother (a kind-looking South Asian woman in a bright yellow hijab) kneeling down to comfort her. The background is soft and warm with golden lighting. Aaliya's emotional expression is clearly visible with her trembling lip and worried eyebrows.
illustration.alt: Aaliya crying while her mother comforts her

pages.text: Mama wrapped Aaliya in the biggest, warmest hug. 'It's okay to feel sad, my brave girl,' Mama said gently. 'Big feelings are normal. Let's look for Koko together.' Papa and big brother Zain joined the search too. They looked under beds, behind curtains, and in toy boxes.

illustration.description: A heartwarming scene showing Aaliya's diverse family searching together - Mama in her yellow hijab looking under a couch, Papa (a tall man with a beard) checking behind curtains, and older brother Zain (about 8 years old) looking in a colorful toy chest. The living room is cozy with warm orange and red tones, family photos on the walls, and soft lighting creating a loving atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Aaliya's family working together to search for the missing teddy bear

pages.text: 'Found him!' called Zain happily from the kitchen. There was Koko, sitting in the laundry basket, all clean and fluffy! Aaliya's sad feelings melted away like ice cream in sunshine. She felt so happy and grateful. 'Thank you, family!' she giggled, hugging Koko tight.

illustration.description: A joyful scene in a bright kitchen where Zain holds up the brown teddy bear triumphantly from a white laundry basket. Aaliya runs toward them with arms outstretched, her face beaming with happiness and relief. Her parents stand nearby smiling warmly. The kitchen has cheerful yellow walls, colorful dish towels, and sunlight streaming through a window, creating a celebratory mood.
illustration.alt: Happy reunion as Aaliya is reunited with her teddy bear Koko

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Aaliya feel when she couldn't find Koko?
questions.explanation: Aaliya felt very sad when her special teddy bear was missing. She had tears and felt scared.

questions.question: Who helped Aaliya look for Koko?
questions.explanation: Aaliya's whole family helped - Mama, Papa, and her big brother Zain all searched together.

questions.question: Where did they find Koko?
questions.explanation: Zain found Koko in the laundry basket in the kitchen, all clean and fluffy.

questions.question: What did Mama tell Aaliya about big feelings?
questions.explanation: Mama told Aaliya that big feelings are normal and it's okay to feel sad sometimes.

Aaliya's eyes filled with big, _____ tears when she couldn't find her teddy bear.
The whole _____ helped search for Koko together.
